name: Pixel Shadow Hunters
description: Five ancient predators reborn from shadow and darkness. Pixel art creatures with dark/purple/black aesthetics, each archetype a deadly hunter of the night.

bases.name: Night Stalker
bases.description: A shadow-maned lion with piercing purple eyes. Silent apex predator of the dark plains.

bases.name: Venom Strike
bases.description: A hooded serpent coiled in darkness, dripping phosphorescent venom. Strikes from the void.

bases.name: Dark Talon
bases.description: A raptor of obsidian feathers with blazing red eyes. Commands the night skies with razor talons.

bases.name: Swamp Horror
bases.description: An ancient crocodilian beast lurking in toxic swamps. Rows of jagged teeth emerge from murky depths.

bases.name: Shadow Carapace
bases.description: A massive horned beetle with an impenetrable dark carapace. Its shell absorbs all light.

shadow-effects.name: Shadow Aura
shadow-effects.description: Pulsing dark energy radiates from the creature's body

shadow-effects.name: Void Tendrils
shadow-effects.description: Dark tendrils of void energy extend from the creature

shadow-effects.name: Eclipse Halo
shadow-effects.description: A dark eclipse ring hovers above the creature's head

shadow-effects.name: Phantom Trail
shadow-effects.description: A ghostly afterimage trails behind the creature

shadow-effects.name: Dark Mist
shadow-effects.description: Swirling dark mist rises from the ground around the creature

dark-markings.name: Cursed Runes
dark-markings.description: Glowing purple rune symbols etched into the creature's body

dark-markings.name: Vein Lines
dark-markings.description: Dark purple veins visible through the creature's skin

dark-markings.name: Skull Mark
dark-markings.description: A pixel skull marking branded on the creature's body

dark-markings.name: Shadow Stripes
dark-markings.description: Diagonal dark stripes pattern across the body

dark-markings.name: Hex Spots
dark-markings.description: Hexagonal dark spots with subtle inner glow

hunter-gear.name: Shadow Blade
hunter-gear.description: A dark-energy infused blade strapped to the creature's back

hunter-gear.name: Bone Collar
hunter-gear.description: Bone necklace with fang pendant and dark gem centerpiece

hunter-gear.name: Spiked Armor
hunter-gear.description: Dark metal shoulder plates with deadly spikes

hunter-gear.name: Night Goggles
hunter-gear.description: Green-lensed tactical goggles for night hunting

hunter-gear.name: Chain Wrap
hunter-gear.description: Dark chains wrapped around body with glowing jewel weight

special.name: Purple Flame Eyes
special.description: Eyes erupt with purple spectral flame and floating embers

special.name: Spectral Wings
special.description: Translucent ghostly wings made of shadow energy

special.name: Toxic Drool
special.description: Glowing toxic substance dripping from the creature's jaws

special.name: Night Crown
special.description: A dark metal crown with purple gems, mark of the shadow king

special.name: Soul Orbs
special.description: Floating purple soul orbs orbit the creature with energy connections
